narrative.headline: 2020 Mazda CX-30: brakes lead the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 31 complaints with NHTSA. Service brakes are the most reported area at 23%, followed by the electrical system, fuel/propulsion, and engine (each 16%). No fires, injuries, or deaths are reported. Two complaints involved a crash: one on the brakes and one on the fuel/propulsion system.

issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: The top complaint: 7 reports (23%), including 1 crash. Test the brakes carefully and note any hesitation before they engage.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: 5 reports (16%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. Check the audio and electronics for glitches during a test drive.

issues.title: Structure
issues.blurb: The fewest reports at 3 (10%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries. A smaller complaint area, including the hatch door module.
